name: pr-automerge
description: PreToolUse(Bash) auto-merge router for `gh pr create`, implemented in hexa-lang (`_pr_automerge.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). Whitespace-tokenizes the command and scans for the `gh pr create` 3-gram anywhere — catches bare `gh pr create …` and chained forms like `git push && gh pr create …` (the common case). When matched and not draft / not already merging, rewrites via the hook `updatedInput` field to append ` && gh pr merge --squash --delete-branch` — transparent atomic create-then-merge. Enforces commons @D g47 (PR ship discipline — no unmerged stacks). Skip conditions: `--draft` flag present · command already contains `gh pr merge`. NO opt-out by design (commons @D g30).
